name: Shyondemic
short_description: You play as a Husky Girl, Survive the Pandemic, make a story path for her. Move fast or Die fast.
detailed_description:
Shyondemic Is a Pandemic Survival game set in a Furry city experiencing a pandemic. Drawing inspiration from real-world events like COVID-19, the game recreates the experience of quarantine and survival during a pandemic but more fun.

You play as Lamina, A shy Husky Girl that move to a big city, Nusanka. Just a day after moving there, she got a taste of Pandemic. Which forcing her to Quarantine herself in her own apartment.

Don't be a skill issue then got caught with those funny looking liquid, u gonna get Liquifed.

 This is Lamina after you being a skill issue

(  Flickering image warnings! For those who had sensitive flickering imagery )

  • Story Rich with 6 Multiple Endings

  • Water ( Take a shower )

  • Simequids ( No don't touch this things )

  • Computers ( It's time to not touch grass yeaahhhh )

  •  Bottle Flip

  • Cute Friends ( Like u )

  • Unique Art and Songs

  • Cooking ( Let Her Cook )

  • Created Mostly by one person

  • 3 - 6 Hours of gameplay to get a single ending

Other Features:

Use her Computer to access things like, Shops, Marketplace, Media Social, Freelancing, Crypto Trading, Crypto Miner and even Gambling, to help you survive the pandemic. The groceries prices are going expensive on each day. So make sure you prepared from the economy sides.

There is many items you can use to deal with them or survive, like Guns, Water Grenade, Water Trap, Water Galons, Water Bottle, Deodorant, FloffSoap and many more.

You can also Upgrade Lamina stats using Upgrade Books or Using Upgradable items.

Other Other Features:

Memes.

Other Other Other Features:

Boykisser.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This Boy3 is lurking at u waiting for u to touch the wishlist button
